entry.title: New IDC W15QKN23D0029 awarded to BAE SYSTEMS GCS INTERNATIONAL LIMITED for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: PBLCS 2.0 FOLLOW ON CONTRACT FOR THE M777 SPARE PARTS AND SERVICES

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: SMALL ARMS, ORDNANCE, AND ORDNANCE ACCESSORIES MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS NOT INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.
